content.en:
Ye Tian's movements were very fast, and in an instant, he grabbed the pieces of God-making Golden Leaf in his hands.

And after a while, the god-making golden tree disappeared again.

However, the god-making gold leaves on the god-making golden tree had been completely picked by Ye Tian.

In fact, Ye Tian really wanted to take the God-making Golden Tree with him, but he found that he couldn't, the God-making Golden Tree was connected to this treasure land, Luopeng Valley, and Luopeng Valley was connected to the end of the realm.

Unless his strength can shake the end of the entire realm, there is no way to take away the Golden Tree of God Creation.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only give up the Golden Tree of Creation.

"There are more than 3,000 pieces of God-making Golden Leaves, although each God-making Golden Leaf contains less extreme substance than the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, but the number is enough, and its value far exceeds those few Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

It can be said that this time he made a lot of money!

However, this treasure land has no meaning to him, although the God Creation Golden Tree will continue to give birth to new God Creation Gold Leaf, but at that time, he is definitely already a half-step perfect controller or perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm.

At that time, he didn't need to create god gold leaf or other extremely powerful substances.

Wow!

Ye Tian left Luopeng Valley and immediately returned to the Ruins of Eternity.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian returned to the Ruins of Eternity.

After coming back, Ye Tian annihilated this replica body again and recondensed a replica body, which was also worried that the Stone Dragon Demon Lord would secretly follow him and leave a breath mark on him again.

It's unlikely, but it's a matter of prevention.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to refine the Golden Leaf of the Creation God.

With the passage of time, pieces of God-making Golden Leaves were refined by Ye Tian, and the potential of Ye Tian's controlled body became higher and higher, and to a certain extent, the controlled body also improved a lot.

After a long time, more than 3,000 God-making Golden Leaves had all been absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, and the potential of his controlling body had been raised to an extremely high level.

"Very good, not only has the potential of the control body increased, but the strength has also increased by a small margin!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian's main purpose was to improve the changes of his Endless Dao, strive to master more changes in the Endless Dao, and master the perfect mark of the Endless Dao as soon as possible.

Before you know it, tens of thousands of eternal years have passed.

And at this moment, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was in a very bad mood, and he suspected that he had been cheated by Ye Tian.

"What's the matter, I still can't control Ye Tian, could it be that this guy didn't practice the Infinite Resurrection Secret Technique?" The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was puzzled: "Impossible, the Infinite Resurrection Secret Technique I created is extremely perfect, even if it is shown to a perfect controller like the Lord of Time, he can't see any problems." Moreover, the secret technique cannot be taught to others, it can only be seen by Ye Tian himself, will he be able to endure such a secret technique? Or is he too wasteful to practice my infinite resurrection?"

Thinking about it, he felt that Ye Tian was still too wasteful, and he couldn't practice infinite resurrection at all.

"Could this guy have been forcibly cultivated by the Wudao Tower? Or is it that Ye Tian is not compatible with Infinite Resurrection, and he can't practice it? Damn, he wasted those god-making golden leaves!"

He was ready to give up on Ye Tian and choose his target again.

After all, he just needed an inside line who could help him get revenge on the Wudao Tower in the future.

Therefore, this person can be anyone.

"When you have the opportunity, let's kill Ye Tian!" said the Stone Dragon Demon Lord secretly.

And what he didn't know was that Ye Tian had already practiced infinite resurrection.

......

this day.

There was good news, that is, Ye Tian's Black Immortal Senior Brother had finally gone one step further, reached the half-step Perfect Controller realm, and passed the assessment of the Daoless Tower, and joined the Daoless Tower by luck.

This is also the luck of the Black Decay Master, who came to the Eternal Ruins before becoming a half-step perfect master, and reshaped the foundation in the Ten Realm-level Masters stage, and his potential was greatly enhanced.

If he had become a half-step perfect controller in the Origin Realm Sea, he would naturally have flaws, and it would be difficult for him to join the Daoless Tower, or it would have been much more difficult.

It's like the Ten Elements Ancestor, whose talent and qualifications are not weaker than those of the Black Decay Controller, but unfortunately his potential is not good, so he can't join the Wudao Tower, so he can only retreat to the second.

Ye Tian's Daoless Tower is among the towers.

The Black Decay Controller came to visit Ye Tian, and the two sat here drinking and talking.

"Little junior brother, I didn't expect you to grow so fast now, I just joined the Wudao Tower, and I heard about your achievements. They all said that you were now the most powerful of the many peak half-step perfect masters of the Daoless Tower. And I'm just an ordinary half-step perfect controller, and the gap is getting bigger and bigger!"

"I'm just a little luckier!"

Ye Tian said.

"The little junior brother is still so humble. "

The Black Decay Controller smiled slightly.

Subsequently, the two chatted for a long time, and the Black Decay Controller also asked Ye Tian for advice on the cultivation of the half-step perfect controller, and Ye Tian naturally gave serious guidance.

Soon after, the Black Decay Master left, while Ye Tian continued to cultivate.

Although he was still some distance away from being a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, he still had to grasp the time and practice seriously, at least condensing the perfect mark of the Endless Dao first.

this day.

There is good news that the treasure land under the command of the Dao Tower, the Dao Ancient Realm, is about to open.

The Dao Ancient Realm is a very strange world, and it is also an extremely important treasure place of the Daoless Tower.

The Dao Ancient Realm is not big, and there is nothing special in ordinary times, just an ordinary world, but in some worlds there will be special changes, at this time, you can integrate your own Dao into the origin of the Dao Ancient Realm, so as to show the changes of the Dao, present in the void of the Dao Ancient Realm, let yourself observe the many changes of your own Dao, and help to grasp more changes in your own Dao.

Of course, the Dao Ancient Realm can accommodate very limited Dao, so the number of places is also limited.

Basically, at most one hundred pinnacle half-step perfect controllers can enter each time.

Now, the Dao Ancient Realm is about to usher in this special period, so the Dao Tower wants to open the Dao Ancient Realm, but it will also allow a hundred peak half-step perfect controllers to enter.

Ye Tian can naturally obtain a qualification, after all, if he is not qualified, the others are even less qualified.

Soon, the Daoless Tower informed Ye Tian that he would soon be able to enter the Dao Ancient Realm, and he obtained one of the places.

"I hope that by entering the Dao Ancient Realm this time, I can master the changes of the Endless Dao more!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Soon, the day of the opening of the Dao Ancient Realm came.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to the Dao Ancient Realm through the time and space gate of the Daoless Tower.
